type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: There was a small change in the consumption of natural gas due to the commissioning of a new natural gas fuelled cogeneration system that provides heat, electricity, and future CO2 rich (NOx controlled by SCR) exhaust to the greenhouses when needed.  The new cogeneration system therefore reduced the reliance of heat by the greenhouses from existing the natural gas fuelled hot water boilers.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: There was an increase in the consumption of natural gas due to the commissioning of a new natural gas fuelled cogeneration system that provides heat, electricity, and future CO2 rich (NOx controlled by SCR) exhaust to the greenhouses when needed.  The new cogeneration system reduced the reliance of heat by the greenhouses from existing the natural gas fuelled hot water boilers.  However, the overall natural gas usage was greater compared to the previous year due to changes in production levels and the partial use of the natural gas boilers.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
In 2011 Houweling Nurseries Ltd. at Delta used only natural gas fuelled boilers, rather than a combination of natural gas and wood residue fuelled boilers as was the case during the previous year; except for a limited period during March 2011 when excess fuel in some of the wood residue fuelled boilers was burned off during their decommissioning.

The change to the use of only natural gas fuelled boilers significantly reduced Carbon Monoxide emissions compared to the previous 2010 reporting year.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment: The emission of Carbon Monoxide is reported voluntarily for the 2011 reporting year as it does not meet its NPRI reporting criterion.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
In 2011 Houweling Nurseries Ltd. at Delta used only natural gas fuelled boilers, rather than a combination of natural gas and wood residue fuelled boilers as was the case during the previous year; except for a limited period during March 2011 when excess fuel in some of the wood residue fuelled boilers was burned off during their decommissioning.

The change to the use of only natural gas fuelled boilers significantly reduced PM10 emissions compared to the previous 2010 reporting year.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
In 2011 Houweling Nurseries Ltd. at Delta used only natural gas fuelled boilers, rather than a combination of natural gas and wood residue fuelled boilers as was the case during the previous year; except for a limited period during March 2011 when excess fuel in some of the wood residue fuelled boilers was burned off during their decommissioning.

The change to the use of only natural gas fuelled boilers significantly reduced PM2.5 emissions compared to the previous 2010 reporting year.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: There was an increase in natural gas usage due to the full operation of the new natural gas fuelled cogeneration system that provides heat, electricity, and CO2 rich exhaust (NOx controlled by SCR) to the greenhouses when needed.  The new cogeneration system reduces the reliance of heat for the greenhouses from the existing natural gas fuelled hot water boilers.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: There were major repairs to the co-generation system resulting in significant down time and less natural gas usage during 2018.  The natural gas main line rupture in Northern BC resulted in supply disruptions during the 4th quarter of 2018, resulting in an atypical increase in the consumption of diesel and fuel oil during this period.

type.en: Reason why substance was added to the report
type.fr: Raison pour laquelle la substance a été ajoutée au rapport

comments.comment: The supplier Fortis BC implemented a curtailment in the natural gas supply in January which forced the facility to use diesel as a backup fuel.  Combustion of diesel fuel releases significantly more substances compared to natural gas.  In 2023 one of 2 cogens did not operate for a significant amount of time due to maintenance repair but in 2024 both cogens operated with minimal downtime. These were 2 factors which contributed to a significant increase in NOx emissions.

reasonsForNoActivities.en: Activities were implemented in a previous year; additional activities are either unnecessary or unfeasible at this time
reasonsForNoActivities.fr: Des activités ont été mises en oeuvre lors d'une année précédente; des activités supplémentaires sont soit inutiles ou irréalisables actuellement
